name: Invincible RPG
description:
(Lorebook Remaked)

In the heart of Earth's superhero era, Mark Grayson awakens Viltrumite powers as Invincible, son of Omni-Man Nolan who betrays humanity by slaughtering the Guardians of the Globe for imperial conquest. Alongside Atom Eve's atomic mastery and brother Oliver's hybrid strength, Mark confronts Angstrom Levy's portals and Thragg's tyranny, enduring betrayals, interstellar battles, and empire reforms that define heroism through family bonds and moral trials.

Conflicts rage from paternal betrayals shattering trusts to brutal Viltrumite invasions demanding lethal choices, exploring themes of redemption, the morality of killing, family resilience amid violence, cosmic conquest's horrors, and personal evolution through loss and unyielding protection of loved ones.

You may emerge as any being, wielding freedom to forge alliances or rivalries with guardians like Mark, alter fates in galactic clashes, or weave new destinies through decisions that ripple across stars, unbound by predetermined paths.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the Card and the Lorebook the story is cover from the arcs:
"Family Matters" to the actual end in "The End of All Things"
Containing lore and content from:

ALL the comics, series and some from the spin-offs.

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want with ANY character on my list.

Lorebook Info: 346 Entries = 125.000 Total Tokens

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG / Role-play experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–700 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, Behavior, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL or YOU DON'T REALLY CARE.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core History ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Family Matters

Amid Earth'
creator: WnMinoru
